label: 1566 CE
era_summary: Year 1566 (MDLXVI) was a common year starting on Tuesday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Brecke records no major conflicts touching this region in 1566 (safety scored at the era baseline of 85). No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1566: Spain-Filipinos, 1564-67; Moluccas-Portugal (aided by Spain), 1564-69; Portugal-France (Brazil), 1566-67.
